description: The Mission We need a "Digital Culture Architect" to command our brand’s voice across the internet. Your job is to engineer viral content loops, run narrative experiments, and capture attention with surgical precision. This is a remote, high-availability role for a fast-moving creator who views social platforms as a 24/7 landscape and understands how to move the needle at the absolute forefront of Web3 and internet culture. We value speed, creative intuition, and extreme ownership over corporate credentials. Whether you are a meme connoisseur with a track record of building hyper-engaged audiences or a narrative strategist who knows how to hijack the news cycle, we care about your output. If you have the drive to master our brand’s unique identity and the discipline to maintain an elite posting cadence under high market velocity, we will give you the creative sovereignty to shape our public legacy.
